titleStmt.title: SII 38.210: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 210. (A.R. No. 210 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall the first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kampaṇa uḍaiyār (II) Year: Plavaṅga, Kumbha, ba. di. 3. Wednesday, Attam (Hastam)

summary.p: Records the sale of housesite along with the maṉappaḍappai and the well located within, probably at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, a nīṅgal of Puḻal-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by an individual, Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyar Aḻiyāvradaṅkoṇḍāṉ of Nallūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Veṇkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam for 160 aṉṟāḍu-naḍakkum-nalpaṇam. Among the boundaries of the housesite, a tank called Chāmuṇḍi-ēri is found mentioned. Vēlakkāṭṭū uḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ, the accountant of ūr figures as one of signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kampaṇa Uṭaiyāṟ(k)ku cellā niṉṟa palavaṅka varuṣam kumpanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritikaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyuThe letter ‘yu’ is engraved below the line.peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
puḻalkoṭṭamāṉa vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu niṅkal tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyanāyiṉārkoyil Āticaṇṭecuratevaṟ(k)ku veṇkuṉṟa koṭṭattu nallūr koṭṭattāṉ
tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār Aḻiyāvirataṅkoṇṭāṉ Eṉmaṉai vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvūr vaṭakku tiruvitiyil nāṉ koṇṭuṭaiya maṉaiyāṉa tiruvitikku vaṭakku canti
Īcurattukkum cāmuṇṭierikkum teṟkum cantirācurattukkum pokiṟa vatikku kiḻakku Akampaṭiyāril kariyavaṭukar Irukkum maṉaikku meṟku Inta nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭamaṉai muṉṟaraiyum maṉaippaṭappum maramuṅ kiṇaṟum
Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṭakkum nal ø 100 6 10 Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Aṟupatukkum Inta maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappum maramuṅkiṇaṟum viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Ātitaṇṭecuratevaṟ(k)ku koṭṭattāṉ Aḻiyaā virataṅkoṇṭāṉ Eṉa I�kkuRead eṉa ippaṭikkuIvai
koṭṭattāṉ Aḻiyāvirataṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ Eṟu cevakaṉ Eḻuttu I�Read eṉa ippaṭikkuAṟiveṉ niyamaṅkiḻāṉ Aṅkarāyaṉ Avaiyampukkāṉeṉ I�Read eṉa ippaṭikkuAṟiveṉ niyamaṅkiḻāṉ kāmākkaṉeṉ I�Read eṉa ippaṭikkuAṟiveṉ kaliyūrkiḻavaṉ kopapperumāḷ Eṉ §
Ūrkkaṇakku velakkāṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
